title: Croatian Lamb Tagine
description: A hearty, slow-cooked stew originating from Croatian cuisine, made with tender lamb and flavorful spices.
instructions: Heat the oil in the bottom of a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and brown on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove the lamb and set aside.
Add the onions to the pot and cook until they start to caramelize, about 10 minutes.
Add the paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb back to the pot and add the tagine spice blend. Stir to combine.
Transfer the pot to the oven and cook for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot with lemon wedges on the side.
Serve with couscous or over rice, if desired.
